title: B1 Listening - Part 1 - Test 25
instructions: For each question, listen to the recording and choose the correct answer: A, B or C.

items.context: You hear two friends talking about concert tickets.
items.audio_script: Girl: Are we still meeting at the ticket office for collecting our concert tickets? I wrote it down yesterday, but I have not checked today's message. || Boy: That was the original plan, but the ticket office closes early today. [1]We have to collect them from the information desk instead[/1].. || Girl: Good thing I asked. I nearly went to the old place and waited there. What about the café entrance? || Boy: No, nobody will be waiting there. I will arrive a few minutes early and message you if anything changes again before we start.
items.question: Where must they collect the tickets?
items.explanation: They must collect the tickets from the information desk.

items.context: You hear two students preparing for sports day.
items.audio_script: Boy: Have you packed for sports day tomorrow yet? I put my cap in my bag because I thought that was what we needed. || Girl: That was mentioned earlier, but it is going to be much warmer than expected. [1]Every student needs to bring a water bottle[/1].. || Boy: I am glad I checked. I nearly left my bag by the door. Do I need a towel as well? || Girl: No, that is not necessary. Put the new item in tonight and check the message once more before you leave in the morning.
items.question: What must the student bring?
items.explanation: The student must bring a water bottle.

items.context: You hear two friends deciding what to do after class.
items.audio_script: Woman: Are we still going to go shopping this weekend? I told my family I would be out this afternoon. || Man: That was our first plan, but the shops close early and the cinema is too expensive. We also thought about whether to watch a film. || Woman: So what have we decided? I need to tell my brother soon. || Man: [1]We are going to play table tennis instead[/1].. I will check the times online tonight and send you a message before we meet. || Woman: Great. That sounds easier than the other ideas.
items.question: What are they going to do?
items.explanation: They decide to play table tennis.

items.context: You hear two students discussing a photography workshop.
items.audio_script: Man: I need to check the time for the photography workshop. I wrote down one thirty, but I am not sure it is correct. || Woman: It changed this morning because the teacher needs to prepare the cameras first. [1]The workshop begins at two o'clock now[/1]., and we should arrive ten minutes earlier. || Man: I am glad I asked. I would have arrived at the wrong time and waited there. || Woman: I will send you a reminder later. Bring everything you need, because there may not be time to go home first.
items.question: What time does the workshop begin?
items.explanation: The workshop begins at two o'clock.

items.context: You hear two friends talking about a mobile phone.
items.audio_script: Girl: How are you getting on with your phone? I heard there was a problem with it yesterday. || Boy: I first thought the screen was cracked, and my brother wondered whether the battery would not charge. But someone checked it carefully this morning. [1]The microphone does not work during calls[/1].. || Girl: Can it be repaired soon? You said you needed it to speak to my grandmother tonight. || Boy: Yes, probably. Now we know what is wrong, it should be ready tomorrow. That is a relief, because I cannot manage without it.
items.question: What is wrong with the phone?
items.explanation: The phone's microphone does not work.

items.context: You hear two people planning a journey to college.
items.audio_script: Boy: How are you getting to college tomorrow morning? I thought you were planning to travel by bus. || Girl: I was, but the bus route has changed and it is too wet to cycle. I also considered going by bicycle. [1]I will take the train instead[/1].. || Boy: That sounds sensible. What time do you expect to arrive there? || Girl: Just before eleven, if everything is on time. I checked the journey online, so I will message you when I leave home. || Boy: Good. I will wait near the entrance so you can find me easily.
items.question: How will the speaker get to college?
items.explanation: The speaker will take the train.

items.context: You hear two friends choosing something for a picnic.
items.audio_script: Woman: Did you choose anything for the picnic on Sunday? You were thinking about a cake when we spoke yesterday. || Man: I looked at that, and nearly chose some sandwiches, but we already have sandwiches and several people do not eat cake. [1]I bought a fruit salad in the end[/1].. || Woman: That sounds like a better choice. It is useful as well as thoughtful, so I am sure they will like it. || Man: I hope so. I kept the receipt just in case, and I will wrap it carefully this evening after dinner.
items.question: What did the speaker buy?
items.explanation: The speaker bought a fruit salad.
